name: campfixer
description: A small progressive web app for car camping packing plans.

scripts.check: node --check src/main.js src/app.js src/storage.js src/templates.js src/service-worker.js src/db.js
scripts.copy-sqlite: mkdir -p vendor/sqlite && cp node_modules/@sqlite.org/sqlite-wasm/dist/index.mjs vendor/sqlite/ && cp node_modules/@sqlite.org/sqlite-wasm/dist/sqlite3-worker1.mjs vendor/sqlite/ && cp node_modules/@sqlite.org/sqlite-wasm/dist/sqlite3.wasm vendor/sqlite/ && cp node_modules/@sqlite.org/sqlite-wasm/dist/sqlite3-opfs-async-proxy.js vendor/sqlite/
